memoryArtifacts.headline: Hawise de Lanvallei
memoryArtifacts.description:
«b»Biography«/b»
Hawise de Lanvallei was born after 1212 at of Walkern & Datchworth, Hertfordshire, England, the daughter and heiress of William de Lanvallay and Maud Pecche. 

Before Michaelmas 1219 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Lanvallei於大約1214年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾瓦爾可時，她的父親William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern35歲，母親Hawise Bassett33歲。她和Sir John de Burgh至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1249年在英國艾可可爾斯特享年36歲，埋葬在英國艾可可爾斯特聖 越恩斯 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Lanvallei was born about 1214, in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern, was 35 and her mother, Hawise Bassett, was 33. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Sir John de Burgh. She died in 1249, in Colchester, Essex, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in St John's Abbey, Colchester, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Lanvallei est née environ 1214, à Walkern, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Hawise Bassett, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Sir John de Burgh. Elle est décédée en 1249, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à St John's Abbey, Colchester, Essex, Angleterre.

de.St John's Abbey, Colchester, Essex, Engl: St John's Abbey, Colchester, Essex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Lanvallei um 1214 in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern 35 und ihre Mutter Hawise Bassett 33. Sie hatte mit Sir John de Burgh mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1249 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Colchester, Essex, England und wurde in St John's Abbey, Colchester, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Lanvallei è nata il circa 1214 nel Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Hawise Bassett, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Sir John de Burgh. Morì nel 1249, nel Colchester, Essex, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a St John's Abbey, Colchester, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Lanvalleiが約1214年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウォーケルンで生まれた時，父William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkernは35歳，母Hawise Bassettは33歳であった。彼女はSir John de Burghとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1249年にイギリスエセックスコルチェスターで36歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスコルチェスタースト ジョン'ス アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.St John's Abbey, Colchester, Essex, Engl: 영국 에세스 코체스터 스트 존'스 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Lanvallei(이)가 대략 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 워커에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Bassett(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Sir John de Burgh(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1249년 영국 에세스 코체스터에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 코체스터 스트 존'스 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Lanvallei nasceu aproximadamente 1214, em Walkern, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Bassett, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Sir John de Burgh. Ela faleceu em 1249, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em St John's Abbey, Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.St John's Abbey, Colchester, Essex, Engl: ст джон'с эбби, колчестир, эссекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Lanvallei родилась около 1214 г. в местности валкирн, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Lanvallei Lord of Walkern было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Bassett, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Sir John de Burgh. Она умерла в 1249 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности ст джон'с эбби, колчестир, эссекс, Англия.
